chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No.S-87 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For orders on non-prosecution 25-10-2024 None present for the petitioner. **** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received so far, even office objections have not been complied with by the petitioner, which shows petitioner has lost interest in this matter. Under such circumstances, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
